headline: OpenAI unveils largest ChatGPT overhaul since platform launch
body: OpenAI is executing a major redesign of ChatGPT, marking the most significant platform update since its initial release. This overhaul arrives as competing infrastructure tools proliferate, including multi-model routing proxies and unified API layers that abstract away single-vendor dependencies. For healthcare AI implementations, this signals continued volatility in the foundational layer that clinical decision support tools, administrative automation, and documentation systems depend on. Organizations integrating ChatGPT into EHR workflows or value-based care analytics should plan for potential API changes and evaluate whether architectural decisions lock them into OpenAI's roadmap or allow flexibility across model providers. The competitive pressure evident in the market, combined with OpenAI's iteration velocity, underscores the consulting reality that healthcare AI deployments require architectural flexibility and vendor evaluation strategies that extend beyond feature parity.
